# Call Stack

<img src="img/Screen Shot 2022-05-01 at 9.52.06 PM.png" width=50%>

```python
def f(n):
    # Base Case
    if n==0:
        return
    
    # Recursion Case
    print("H", end="")
    f(n+1)

def main():
    n = 9
    f(n)
    
    
if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
```

**Output:**
```

```
